title: Go back! I want to be rod!
description: Shapeless recipe for recrafting two blaze powder or four wind charges into their respective rod forms.
body:
Shapelessly recraft your blaze and breeze rods.

![Two blaze powder being crafted into a blaze rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e31ea431ce0088811ddadf13015ba27c2db93c3d.webp)

![Four wind charges being crafted into a breeze rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/008c6b4dd89e69a1a16f0383741e7fda46e168f3.png)
